com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Interface BatchExecuteJob

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Job
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ExecuteCampaignJob, ExecuteControlJob
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BatchExecuteJobImpl, ExecuteCampaignJobImpl, ExecuteControlJobImpl

    public interface BatchExecuteJob
extends Job
    Handle for a batch execution job (e.g. control and campaign execution)
    Since:
    TTworkbench 18

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

      java.util.List<Job> getChildrenJobs()
      Get the list of the children jobs
